title: Luffy Enters the Mirror World
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Brûlée, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Nami as Pedro’s sacrifice opens the escape route while Luffy enters the mirror world to hold Katakuri back.
scene: Luffy separates himself from the crew to face Katakuri in the mirror world while Sanji moves toward the cake plan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So you're still alive, huh, brother Peros.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: right now, I'm chasing after their ship with Mama.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: pedro, I mean. 01! Are you even listening, straw hat?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How long do you plan on dozing off?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As long as you're asleep, these soldiers are stuck here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He prob- Abby thought he'd gallantly protect his crew,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: But look at this poor captain!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take the soldiers with you and go set fire to his ship or something.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sister Brucee! We found a mirror that can connect to the straw hats' ship!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And there should be one or two more!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Alright, let's go! I can't wait for Mama to crush them as they run about confused and terrified by the fire!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Will I WIWI WI WI WI!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you dare lay a hand on them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What happened to our one-on- one,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The one that needs to stop

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Laying hands on our brothers and sisters!

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 39 dialogue beats. Luffy commits to stopping Katakuri while the others continue the escape and Sanji turns toward the cake that may save them.
